name: Rice Krispie Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 3 Pound Chickens, cut into 8 to 10 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chickens.
2. Crush the Rice Krispies.
3. Season the cereal with Lowry's Seasoned Salt or to your own taste.
4. Dip each chicken piece in margarine, then into the seasoned cereal to coat evenly.
5. Place the coated chicken pieces on baking sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour, or until cooked through. If cooking takes longer than 1 hour, reduce the temperature to 325°F.
